L1_semantic_fidelity.note: All 35 term definitions and 8 question answer keys reviewed. JP→ZH and JP→EN translations preserve meaning, examples, and structure. No semantic distortions found. Duplicate terms across pages (エスクローサービス×3, IoTゲートウェイ×2, センサー×2, アクチュエーター×2) are complementary multi-facet definitions, not contradictions.

L2_terminological_consistency.note: Zero cross-entity surface inconsistencies within chunk. Zero glossary surface mismatches. Three abbreviated/variant surfaces (CGM, IoT, IoT (Internet of Things：モノのインターネット)) all resolved via glossary aliases_jp. One INFO: section 04-06 zh title connector varies between p177 ('与') and p176/p179 ('·').

L3_structural_integrity.note: All 35 terms have complete jp/zh/en surface and definition fields. All 8 questions have 4 choices and valid answer_index (0–3). All answer indexes verified correct against IT Passport content. No encoding artifacts, replacement chars, or mojibake found. Table and figure captions fully trilingual.

issues.detail: Section 04-06 zh title uses inconsistent connector character: p176/p179 use '·' (U+00B7 middle dot), p177 uses '与' (conjunction). Cosmetic inconsistency; all three are semantically correct renderings of '・' or 'and'.

limitations: Question answer correctness validated by reviewer domain knowledge, not against official answer key source file.
Table cell content reviewed for completeness but truncated EN cells (>120 chars) not fully printed — manual scan showed no truncation defects.
Section entities have no definition field by design; blank surface fields on sections/figures are expected structural pattern.
